title: CT woman invents kids' product. One parent 'actually got two'
description: McIntosh, who doesn't have children, is also working on developing an artificial intelligence app to answer parent questions about childhood
content:
An old adage says, “necessity is the mother of invention.”

title: Artificial Intelligence: Revolutionizing Every Aspect of Life - Anthropic's AI Revolution: Balancing Innovation and Employment Impact
description: Artificial Intelligence (AI) is rapidly redefining the way we live, work, and interact. No longer confined to the realm of science fiction, AI is now a driving force behind innovations across all sectors— from healthcare and finance to entertainment and manufacturing. Its impact is far-reaching, transforming industries, reshaping economies, and influencing the way we navigate daily life.

title: AI investments fuelling global patent growth: UN
description: The number of international patents filed last year for digital communications technology and semiconductors grew strongly, reflecting the surge in artificial intelligence investments, the United Nations said Friday. Digital communication, the top category among international patent filings, grew by six percent last year, as did applications for semiconductor patents.

description: Congress should issue legally binding guidelines for the use of artificial intelligence in war — including restrictions on mass surveillance and autonomous weapons.

title: Anthropic confirms supply‑chain risk designation; CEO apologises for criticising Trump
description: American artificial intelligence (AI) company Anthropic confirmed it has been formally designated a “Supply Chain Risk (SCR)” by the US government, as the firm's CEO also apologised for criticising President Donald Trump.
